datasets.label: China SSE50 / ih pool
datasets.notes: Released MASS-compatible dataset with available modalities restricted to OHLCV, cross-industry labels, price features, and macro context.

datasets.label: S&P 500 transfer dataset
datasets.notes: Local SP500 extension used for cross-market transfer checks with stock_num=40 for coverage.

experiments.label: China 64-agent baseline A
experiments.takeaway: The original SA + Signal_std baseline is the strongest robust 64-agent result in the China ablation.
limitations: Signal-quality metric only; not a portfolio-return result.

experiments.label: China 64-agent CMA-ES D
experiments.takeaway: CMA-ES recovers from the SA learn-alpha collapse but does not beat the 64-agent baseline.
limitations: Signal-quality metric only; not a portfolio-return result.

experiments.label: China 64-agent CMA-ES E with turnover
experiments.takeaway: Turnover penalty improves consistency but still does not beat the simple 64-agent baseline.
limitations: Signal-quality metric only; not a portfolio-return result.

experiments.label: China 64-agent weak-turnover F
experiments.takeaway: Weak turnover penalty is highly unstable and worse than no penalty or strong penalty.
limitations: High variance across only three seeds.

experiments.label: China 512-agent improved E
experiments.takeaway: The improved mechanism is positive at 512 agents and exceeds the robust 64-agent baseline mean.
limitations: Signal-quality metric only; not a portfolio-return result.

experiments.label: China 512-agent baseline A
experiments.takeaway: The SA baseline collapses at 512 agents in the local China run, supporting the optimizer-capability story.

experiments.label: SP500 512-agent improved E short-window transfer
experiments.takeaway: The improved 512-agent mechanism transfers directionally to SP500, but the signal is weaker than the China hero result.
limitations: Uses stock_num=40 for broader SP500 coverage.
Signal-quality metric only; not a portfolio-return result.

experiments.label: SP500 512-agent baseline A short-window comparator
experiments.takeaway: The matched SP500 SA baseline is much weaker than the improved E-512 seed-42 run on Rank IC.

comparisons.label: China 64-agent ablation
comparisons.summary: At 64 agents, the simple SA + Signal_std baseline is the strongest robust result; the mechanism fixes do not beat it with three seeds.

comparisons.label: China 512-agent scale comparison
comparisons.summary: At 512 agents, the improved CMA-ES mechanism is positive while the SA baseline is negative in the single-seed local check.

comparisons.label: SP500 transfer comparison
comparisons.summary: The SP500 transfer evidence is positive for E-512 and stronger than the matched A-512 seed-42 baseline, but remains weaker than China and should be treated as signal-transfer evidence rather than portfolio performance.
